candidates.why: This is an R&D sub-component inside Development costs. Since Development costs is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding this separately would distort the intended XSGA minus XRD treatment.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS reference bucket is the combined sum of Development costs, Selling and distribution costs, and Management and administrative expenses. The visible D&A rows are presented as sub-components under those selected rows, not as separate same-level operating expense lines. Per the R&D interaction rule, do not separately add R&D D&A because Development costs is already included in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
